Imbued Shield of Paineel  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 22
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +4
SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL SHD BRD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Be cautious trading with Graffyx. I know that he lied about an item's effects to one of the main traders on the server.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 27 2001 at 7:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Looking for one of these on the Innoruuk server.. paying or trading very well )
Effect?
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 10:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
I'm not understanding the logic behind this effect. Why would a shield from Paineel have enduring breath on it? It's not exactly "Waterworld" there. Sometimes I wonder about the effects on items.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 02 2002 at 8:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) who cares if it drops in the the hole, it is a great effect..
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 21 2002 at 11:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It's damn role playing game after all, isn't it
RE: Effect?
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 3:56 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249524858
Scholar
32 posts
From what I understand of the history of Paineel and the Hole, in a desperate measure to prevent the minions of the Plane of Underfoot from destroying all of the Erudites, Dartain, a powerful Erudite heretic, and his compatriots flooded the breach (perhaps to prevent fire elementals from crossing the breach?). He used this shield to breath underwater and continue his work to seal the breach in the Living Wall of Stone (the barrier between Norrath and the Plane of Underfoot). He was successful but at a pyrrhic cost; he and all his friends were trapped on the Underfoot side of the breach. All but Dartain were slain by the elementals whose vital essence managed to escape but whose mortal remains were forever lost in the Plane of Underfoot.
▲ Page top
RE: Effect?
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2002 at 4:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965791865
View User Forum
47 posts
Came Upon this since I've been huntin the Hole lately and just wanna say, thanks for the awesome explanation. I will definitely roll on this if no one needs in the group i'm in. My SK would love to bash with it.

QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 4:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
Very interesting background information. I thank thee sir!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 20 2001 at 2:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Don't mistake the effect. "Enduring Breath" is NOT "Water Breathing." It negates the need for air. If you look at the spell effect messages, you'll see these:
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 13 2001 at 7:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Pick, pick, picky aren't we?
#Sigoniax, Posted: Sep 06 2001 at 7:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You say tomato I say tomata
It is a Ribcage Shield
